title: • Graphics may be used, but any external images must be credited
content:
• Graphics may be used, but any external images must be credited with APA citations.
• Layout and formatting should enhance clarity and organization.

⸻

Next Steps

If you’re ready, you can start uploading the student submissions for this assignment. I will evaluate them based on clarity, structure, effectiveness, and adherence to the assignment guidelines. Let me know how you’d like the feedback formatted (workshop-style letters or rubric-based evaluations).  ------  Based on the Technical Instructions Assignment Directions, I will use the following rubric to critique and provide feedback:

Technical Instructions Grading Rubric (100 Points)
1. Clarity & Readability (25 points)
• Are the instructions easy to follow and clearly written?
• Does the language match the target audience’s knowledge level?
• Are technical terms explained when necessary?
2. Organization & Structure (20 points)
